title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Saksoft Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Saksoft Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Saksoft Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Saksoft Global Group:
Saksoft Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft Global Group!
